checkout_candidates.label: CalmSprout Square support
checkout_candidates.evidence: Configured support_url redirects to the Square-hosted CalmSprout support page.
checkout_candidates.notes: Voluntary support only. This does not gate delivery, create an order, or prove product revenue.
checkout_candidates.blocker: Needs a separate Daily Shelf store or product checkout before store_connected can become true.

checkout_candidates.label: CalmSprout Square shop
checkout_candidates.evidence: Existing public CalmSprout shop URL found in prior site markup.
checkout_candidates.notes: This is not configured for Daily Shelf printable packs and should not be used as the shelf checkout.
checkout_candidates.blocker: Needs product, compliance, fulfillment, refund, and payout verification for Daily Shelf before any link is used.

checkout_candidates.label: Archived PayPal hosted-button code
checkout_candidates.evidence: Archived CalmSprout template contains PayPal hosted-button code.
checkout_candidates.notes: The public shelf does not publish archived pay buttons as checkout without owner and product verification.
checkout_candidates.blocker: Needs merchant ownership, payout, product, price, delivery, refund, and compliance verification.

support_tiers.label: Small thank-you
support_tiers.description: A light support nudge for one useful worksheet.

support_tiers.label: Bundle supporter
support_tiers.description: A fair support level for the starter archive.

support_tiers.label: Keep it running
support_tiers.description: Helps keep daily publishing, hosting, and maintenance alive.

monetization.affiliate_disclosure: Support links route to a Square-hosted CalmSprout gift-card/support page. Product checkout is not connected yet; pack downloads remain public until a store is connected.
